date.text:
• Designed outcomes-driven curriculum sequences for adult and young learner programmes, mapping learning objectives to CEFR descriptors and institutional quality standards.

  • Developed structured lesson frameworks integrating communicative tasks, real-world scenarios, formative checkpoints, and summative assessment — ensuring coherent scope and sequence across course levels.

  • Authored assessment instruments aligned to CEFR band descriptors; applied performance data to iteratively refine instructional design decisions.

  • Collaborated cross-functionally with academic leads to maintain curriculum consistency, quality assurance, and alignment to learner outcomes across multiple course strands.

  • Contributed to professional learning communities (INSET) and applied reflective design practice to continuously improve course materials and delivery models.
date.headline: British Council - Teacher of English
Apollo English Junior - EFL Teacher
date.text:
• Implemented and contextualised predesigned instructional frameworks for young learner programmes, adapting content sequencing to meet mixed-ability cohort needs.

  • Conducted placement testing and diagnostic assessments to support learner profiling and appropriate curriculum pathway allocation.

  • Developed supplementary materials and differentiated task sets to address identified learner gaps, improving curriculum accessibility and learning outcomes.

date.headline: Rose English Homestay - EFL Tutor
date.text:
• Adapted ready-made lesson plans into personalised, learner-centred experiences for young learners and adults across online and offline delivery formats.

  • Designed formative homework tasks, assessed learner outputs, and maintained performance records to inform ongoing instructional adjustments.
